message:
fix(engine): implement native REPLACE with full index cleanup and fix page cache edge case

The VDBE engine's REPLACE conflict resolution was only deleting the
conflicting row from the table btree, leaving orphaned entries in all
associated indexes. This caused phantom rows to appear in index scans
and violated the index-table consistency invariant.

- Add native_replace_row() that locates the conflicting row, parses its
  record to extract column values, finds all index cursors for the table,
  constructs proper index keys (column values + rowid), and deletes the
  corresponding index entries before finally deleting the table row
- Replace both OE_REPLACE (5/8) and unique-index-conflict call sites
  with native_replace_row() for consistent behavior
- Fix page cache edge case in pager
- Minor connection and sheaf conformal adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
